nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-consuming or inefficient for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: These uses are to help save time

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely go back and forth because I am making changes and updates as I go

nodes.label: Authenticity of AI-generated content
nodes.label_negative: AI output sounding unnatural or not like me
nodes.grounding_span: the models do not sound natural or speak the way that I would

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it panics and hallucinates. It will say that it has completed what I've asked for, but it hasn't

nodes.label: AI as tool requiring human oversight
nodes.label_negative: Full delegation to AI without human review
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel comfortable giving up that full control for the model to handle things on its own

nodes.label: AI understanding of user intent
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't understand what I'm asking for

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It saves me so much time

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: the models do not sound natural or speak the way that I would

nodes.label: Trustworthiness and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust that something important might be missed or communicated inaccurately

nodes.label: Professional quality and thoroughness
nodes.grounding_span: Everything that comes from me, I want to be up to my standard

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for template and table creation
nodes.grounding_span: It makes me especially happy when it creates tables and templates for me

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: it panics and hallucinates. It will say that it has completed what I've asked for, but it hasn't

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to create messages and anything related to informal communication without the use of AI

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: In the future I think AI will be able to complete all my tasks without needing me to fix it

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
